title: Critoniopsis brachystephana
taxonomy: Critoniopsis brachystephana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is classified under the genus Critoniopsis, which belongs to the tribe Senecioneae. Critoniopsis brachystephana further belongs to the subfamily Cichorioideae. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships with other Asteraceae species. The plant's classification is primarily based on its morphological characteristics and genetic similarity with other related species.
